    "Drain slope is less than the required 1/4 inch per foot for standard horizontal branch piping, or exceeds maximum slope causing solids to strand."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-hang and adjust the slope of the affected drain piping to meet the minimum 1/4 inch per foot slope requirement before wall close-out."
  ],
  "rationale": "The observed drain slope is under the 1/4 in/ft minimum required by code for standard horizontal drainage piping (or is sloped too steeply causing solids to separate from liquid), which will lead to frequent blockages and system failure.",
